# myskill

This skill exists only in the project-level `.agents/skills/` directory.
If the project sync pipeline works, the version home gets a copy of this
file at `<version-home>/.<agent>/skills/myskill/SKILL.md`.

SKILL_TOKEN_PROJECT_SKILL_AVAILABLE
